props.headline: Ship Projects Faster. Stress Less. Stay in Flow.
props.subtext: FlowSpace is the modern project-management platform that keeps remote teams aligned, deadlines on track, and work moving — without the chaos of spreadsheets or the bloat of legacy tools.

props.heading: Trusted by fast-moving teams at
props.items: Stripe, Notion, Linear, Vercel, Figma, Loom, Pitch, Descript

props.heading: The numbers speak for themselves
props.items:
40% | Faster project delivery
3× | More tasks completed on time
12 hrs | Saved per team per week
98% | Customer satisfaction score

props.heading: Everything your team needs to do great work
props.items:
Visual Kanban Boards | Drag-and-drop cards across fully customizable columns. See your entire workflow at a glance — from backlog to done.
Smart Deadlines | Set milestones, assign owners, and get AI-powered deadline nudges before tasks slip through the cracks.
Real-Time Collaboration | Comment, @mention teammates, and co-edit task details simultaneously. No more waiting on email replies.
Automated Workflows | Build no-code automation rules that assign tasks, send alerts, and move cards — so your team focuses on real work.
Time Tracking Built-In | Log hours directly on tasks, generate time reports, and keep billing and budgets perfectly accurate.
Advanced Analytics | Interactive dashboards show velocity, blockers, and workload distribution so managers can act — not just observe.

props.caption: A live FlowSpace board — real teams, real projects, real results.

props.heading: Up and running in under 10 minutes
props.items:
1. Create Your Workspace | Sign up, name your workspace, and invite teammates in seconds. No IT setup. No lengthy onboarding.
2. Build Your First Board | Choose from 50+ project templates or start from scratch. Customize columns, labels, and priority levels to match your process.
3. Ship Work, Celebrate Wins | Assign tasks, hit deadlines, and watch your project velocity climb week over week.

props.heading: Teams that switched to FlowSpace never look back
props.items:
FlowSpace replaced four separate tools for us. Our sprint planning meetings went from 90 minutes to 20. It's genuinely transformed how we operate. | Sarah Chen | VP of Engineering, Meridian Health
I've tried Asana, Monday, Jira — nothing stuck. FlowSpace just feels natural. My team adopted it in a day and we've been flying ever since. | Marcus Webb | Founder, Pulsar Studios
The automation alone saves us at least half a day a week. We set up rules once and forgot about the busywork entirely. | Priya Nair | Head of Product, Kaizen Labs
We manage 30+ client projects simultaneously. FlowSpace's dashboards give me an instant health check on everything without digging through threads. | Tom Gallagher | COO, Brightwave Agency

props.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
props.items:
Starter | $0 | /month | Up to 5 users; 3 active projects; Kanban boards; Basic integrations | /signup
Grow | $18 | /user/month | Unlimited projects; Smart deadlines; Time tracking; Automations (50/mo); Priority support | /signup?plan=grow
Scale | $38 | /user/month | Everything in Grow; Advanced analytics; Unlimited automations; SSO & SAML; Dedicated success manager | /signup?plan=scale

props.heading: Frequently asked questions
props.items:
Is there really no credit card required for the free plan? | Absolutely. The Starter plan is free forever for up to 5 users. No card, no trial period — just sign up and start working.
Can I migrate my data from Jira, Asana, or Trello? | Yes. FlowSpace offers one-click imports from Jira, Asana, Trello, Monday.com, and CSV exports from any tool.
How does per-user pricing work for larger teams? | You pay only for active users. If a team member goes on leave you can deactivate their seat and stop being charged — simple.
Is FlowSpace secure? | FlowSpace is SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and uses 256-bit AES encryption at rest and in transit. Enterprise plans include SSO and audit logs.
Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or startups? | Yes — nonprofits get 50% off any paid plan, and qualified early-stage startups can apply for our Startup Program for 12 months free on Grow.

props.headline: Your team deserves a better way to work.
props.subtext: Join 25,000+ teams already shipping faster with FlowSpace. Start your free workspace today — no credit card required.

props.heading: Get productivity tips straight to your inbox
props.subtext: Weekly strategies, FlowSpace feature updates, and expert advice for high-performing teams. Unsubscribe any time.
